post.description: This API endpoint allows you to query the Voiceflow Knowledge Base and retrieve answers to user questions.  Use this endpoint to send a question and receive a synthesized answer or relevant document chunks from the Knowledge Base.

question.description: The question posed by the user. This should be a natural language string representing the user's query.

chunkLimit.description: Controls the number of chunks used to synthesize the response. More chunks can increase accuracy and token consumption.  The default is 2 chunks, each with a max length of 1000 tokens. This provides up to 2000 tokens worth of context.  If your Knowledge Base (KB) documents are well-structured, 2 chunks should be sufficient.  For more scattered information, consider increasing the chunk limit. Use the `maxchunkSize` parameter in the upload or replace KB doc APIs to control chunk size.

synthesis.description: Indicates whether to use language models to generate an answer.  If set to false, the response will contain the relevant chunks only and no synthesized answer.

settings.description: Optional settings for modifying the Knowledge Base behavior.

model.description: The language model to use for summarization. Available models include 'gpt-3.5-turbo', 'gpt-4', 'gpt-4-turbo', 'gpt-4o', 'claude-v1','claude-v2', 'claude-instant-v1', 'claude-3-haiku', 'claude-3-opus', 'claude-3-sonnet' and 'claude-3.5-sonnet'.

temperature.description: The temperature parameter for language model sampling, ranging from 0 to 1.  Lower values (e.g., 0.1-0.2) result in more precise answers closely aligned with the prompt,  while higher values increase response variability.

system.default: You are an AI FAQ assistant. Information will be provided to help answer the user's questions.  Always summarize your response to be as brief and concise as possible, keeping responses under a couple of sentences.  Do not reference the provided material directly in your response.
system.description: A system message to provide guidance for the AI chat assistant.

tags.description: Optional filters to refine which documents in the KB are eligible to answer the query based on tags.

include.description: Filters KB documents by specific tags they include.

items.description: An array of KB tag labels to include.

operator.description: The operator for combining multiple tags in the "items" array. Default is "or".

exclude.description: Filters KB documents by specific tags they exclude.

items.description: An array of KB tag labels to exclude.

operator.description: The operator for combining multiple tags in the "items" array. Default is "and".

includeAllTagged.description: Filters KB documents to include those that have any KB tags attached.

includeAllNonTagged.description: Filters KB documents to include those that have no KB tags attached.

filters.description: Optional filters to query the Knowledge Base with metadata criteria.  For more details, refer to the [metadata filtering guide](https://developer.voiceflow.com/docs/filter-with-metadata).

200.description: The response containing the answer to the query and relevant document chunks.

output.description: The synthesized answer to the question, if synthesis is enabled.

score.description: The relevance or similarity score of the chunk to the question.

chunkID.description: The unique identifier of the chunk, representing a section of text.

documentID.description: The unique identifier of the document containing the chunk.

content.description: The actual text content of the chunk.

type.description: The type of the source document.

name.description: A readable name for the source.

url.description: The full URL of the source, if applicable.

tags.description: An array of tag labels associated with the document.

queryTokens.description: The number of tokens consumed by the LLM during the synthesis of the query.

answerTokens.description: The number of tokens consumed by the LLM during the synthesis of the answer.

totalTokens.description: The total number of tokens consumed for the entire query and answer process.

DialogManagerAPIKey.name: Authorization
DialogManagerAPIKey.description:
All requests made to any Knowledge Base APIs must be validated with a Dialog Manager API Key.
To obtain a Dialog Manager API key, go to the Integration tab on the project you uploaded data sources to and click the "Copy API key" button.
